arm_grant_air_cas_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_cas
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = early_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_piercing_bombs }

            NOT = { has_tech = jet_multirole9 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_tech = hardware_VII
        }
        add_technology = jet_multirole9
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cv_jet_multirole9 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers

        add_technology = strategic_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_air_transport_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}






















































































































arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = mechanical_computing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_fortification_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = basic_fortification_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = coastal_fort_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_machine_tools }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = basic_machine_tools
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = concentrated_industry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = dispersed_industry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = fuel_silos }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = fuel_silos
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = fuel_refining
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = synth_oil_experiments }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = synth_oil_experiments
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_tech = ww_construction }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = ww_construction
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_tech = ww_pc
        }
        add_technology = atomic_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_tech = hardware_XI
        }
        add_technology = icbm5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = srbm9 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_tech = supercomputer_VI

        add_technology = atomic_reactor_fusion_III
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}















arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = radio_detection

    }

            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_tech = rocket_artillery

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1995 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_tech = hardware_XI
        }
        add_technology = aam_short_range_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = atgm_4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1995 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_land_anti_air_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air

    }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

arm_grant_land_artillery_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battery }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = autocannon_1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

        add_technology = basic_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_battery }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1995 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_tech = hardware_VIII
        }
        add_technology = artillery_5

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis

arm_grant_land_infantry_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_equip_1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1935 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_equip_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mountain_warfare_1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1935 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = mountain_warfare_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_warfare_1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1935 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_warfare_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons1 }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cover_air_operations_4 }

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1975 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = hardware_IV
        }
        add_technology = light_tanks_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tanks_6 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1995 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = hardware_VII

        add_technology = light_tanks_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

arm_grant_land_mechanised_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = iw_armored_vehicles }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = iw_armored_vehicles
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_spaa }

arm_grant_naval_battleships_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = modern_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}







arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}










arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

arm_grant_naval_submarines_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww_submarines }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1935 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww_submarines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = torpedo_ww }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1935 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = torpedo_small_3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_tech = hardware_VIII
        }
        add_technology = torpedo_small_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = attack_submarine_4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_tech = hardware_VII
        }
        add_technology = attack_submarine_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ballistic_submarine_4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_tech = atomic_reactor_naval_II
            has_tech = hardware_IX
        }
        add_technology = ballistic_submarine_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sub_hull_small_single_3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1995 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sub_hull_small_single_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_sam_4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1995 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = heavy_sam_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ashm_4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1995 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = ashm_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_sam_2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = light_sam_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = vls_1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = vls_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = attack_submarine_5 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_tech = hardware_IX
        }
        add_technology = attack_submarine_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ballistic_submarine_5 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_tech = hardware_XI
        }
        add_technology = ballistic_submarine_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sub_hull_small_single_4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sub_hull_small_single_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sub_hull_large_double_3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sub_hull_large_double_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = torpedo_small_4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_tech = hardware_X
        }
        add_technology = torpedo_small_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
